## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavior changes
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes locally, or a focused test command is listed below
- [ ] Documentation updated when user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No credentials, datasets, weights, or generated run artifacts committed

## Test command

```sh
uv run pytest
```
